rationale.R1.2: The output identifies multiple internal inconsistencies and argument-chain issues, demonstrating a thorough walk-through of the chain end-to-end and flagging every load-bearing inconsistency with minimal repairs proposed.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not disclose uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on logical consistency issues rather than scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression in the form of an overclaimed novelty framing.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
